Selene, a Valkyr under Gareth's mentorship, trains in the pre-dawn fog, wrestling with her need for validation. She longs to understand true power, but Gareth teaches that power must be directed by conviction. When a rainbow-dark Veil ripples across the sky at dawn, signalling the failure of the Seal, Selene glimpses the gravity of the coming war. Gareth blesses her, instructing her to 'move in Power,' and leaves her to her path. This chapter introduces the central themes of the VALOR Chronicles—discipline, conviction, and the earliest warning of the Black Swan Accords' crisis.
